overall.description: A slow cinematic walkthrough of a luxurious cyberpunk apartment interior from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring floor-to-ceiling windows with city views, an indoor bamboo garden, modern minimalist furniture, and a prominent holographic lion sculpture. The camera moves from a glass corridor into a lounge area, circles the holographic display, and exits through a dramatic red-lit security gate into a darker interior hallway.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking along a sleek corridor with floor-to-ceiling glass walls on the left revealing a futuristic cityscape. To the left, an interior bamboo garden is visible through glass partitions, creating a zen-like atmosphere within the high-tech apartment.

segments.scene_description: The space opens into a luxurious lounge area with cream leather sofas arranged around a central glass coffee table. A striking holographic lion statue glows golden in the center of the room, while cyan neon lights trace geometric patterns across the ceiling. The bamboo garden remains visible in the background.

events.description: camera begins circling around the holographic lion statue to examine it from different angles

agents.ego_description: circling the holographic lion statue to examine the intricate digital details and nearby objects

entered.detail: dark glass decanter with label sitting on the coffee table
black rectangular plate with sushi rolls on the coffee table

segments.scene_description: Moving closer to the center of the lounge, the camera circles the magnificent holographic lion statue, revealing fine details in the digital projection. The coffee table comes into close view, displaying a whiskey decanter and sushi plate. The seating arrangement and bamboo garden shift in perspective as the camera moves around the sculpture.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition corridor to secure area with red lighting

events.description: ambient lighting shifts dramatically to intense red neon as approaching security gate

agents.ego_description: walking toward the red-lit exit corridor, leaving the lounge area behind

entered.detail: security gate illuminated with intense vertical red neon light strips
tall vertical neon tubes emitting bright red light
tall vertical neon tubes emitting bright red light

segments.scene_description: Leaving the lounge behind, the camera moves toward a dramatic transition point marked by intense red neon lighting. The warm natural light of the lounge gives way to stark red illumination from vertical light strips flanking a security gate. The holographic lion remains visible to the right as the camera approaches the threshold.

scene_state.functional_zone: secure interior corridor beyond red gate

events.description: passing through the red-lit security gate into the darker hallway beyond

agents.ego_description: passing through the metal security gate into the dimly lit corridor

entered.detail: vertical metal bars with red neon accents forming a security barrier
dimly lit hallway extending forward with reflective flooring

segments.scene_description: The camera passes through the metal security gate, leaving the lounge and its bamboo garden behind. The environment transitions to a darker, more enclosed corridor with red ambient lighting reflecting off polished floors. The gate structure moves from foreground to background as the camera enters the secure interior space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a serene, high-tech luxury apartment that gradually transitions into a stark, red-lit secure corridor. It begins by gliding along a sleek glass corridor where a futuristic cityscape and a zen-like bamboo garden are visible through floor-to-ceiling partitions. As the space opens into a luxurious lounge, the camera moves past cream leather sofas and cyan neon ceiling patterns to circle a glowing golden holographic lion statue, bringing a whiskey decanter and sushi plate on a central coffee table into close view. The scene then shifts away from the warm lounge atmosphere toward a dramatic threshold marked by intense red vertical light strips. Finally, the camera passes through a metal security gate, leaving the garden and holographic display behind to enter a darker, enclosed interior hallway where red ambient light reflects off polished floors.
